{{Quote|Uri... Glocken...! ''Move!'' he's ''crushing''... my hand...!|Merl|<ref name="marvel29" />}}
'''Uri''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who worked as a bouncer at [[Merl's]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in the [[Old Town (Centares)|Old Town]] of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Muracie]] on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. Uri, along with his partner [[Glocken]], served as enforcers for the under-the-table dealings of the cantina's owner, [[Merl]], who specialized in hiding desperate people willing to pay. A specialist with his [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]], Uri was known to be quick to draw his weapon if anyone threatened Merl.<ref name="triplet" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], notorious [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] arrived in Merl's while searching for [[Tyler Lucian]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] deserter Merl had helped conceal on Centares. When Valance threatened Merl for information, both Uri and Glocken jumped to his defense, only to be immediately shot down by the quick-trigged hunter.<ref name="marvel29" />

==Behind the scenes==
Uri first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1979]], where he was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]].<ref name="marvel29" /> Although Uri's [[Species/Legends|species]] was originally unidentified, he was revealed as a Gotal in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] adventure seed ''[[Triplet Threat]]''.<ref name="triplet" />
